chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 475 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2182/2025 (Ex) 2. For orders on CMA 2183/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 21.05.2025. On 14.05.2025 following order was passed. “ None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. On the last date of hearing counsel for petitioner sought time for preparation but today he is called absent. Under the circumstances this petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution, however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 21.05.2025.”. Today none appeared nor any intimation received which reflects that they have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
